identity.background_detail: He's the one you notice standing by the perimeter when he should be asleep. He doesn't pace — he stands, still, facing out, like he's waiting for something specific. Nobody's asked him directly what he's waiting for. The people who've thought about it decided they don't want to know.
identity.before: Doesn't say. The stillness says enough.

personality.persona: Almost silent. Still in a way that feels trained, not chosen. Follows Rook without it looking like following. Eats alone. Useful on runs — good instincts, doesn't panic. There's a flatness to how he handles danger that makes people uncomfortable. Trust doesn't make him warm — it makes him present. He starts showing up where you need him before you ask.
personality.voice_notes: Minimal. Sometimes just nods. When he speaks it's factual: 'Movement. East. Two.' Doesn't use full sentences unless directly asked a question, and even then keeps it to the minimum. The most expressive thing about him is where he stands — that's how he communicates priority.
personality.quirks: Speaks in fragments without verbs: 'Movement. East. Two.' Responds to yes/no questions with a nod described in text as silence followed by a single word. Longest sentence anyone's heard from him was six words. When he does speak a full sentence, people stop what they're doing.

relationships.attitude_to_player: Absent until needed. He doesn't form opinions about leadership — he watches the perimeter. Trust means he shows up before you call him. That's the most you'll get.

key_relationships.rook: Follows him. The bond is deep, silent, and predates the Camp.
key_relationships.ivo: The three of them share something. Marsh's role in it is the quiet part.
key_relationships.tomas: Knows Tomás watches him. Doesn't react. Doesn't change. That's either nothing or everything.
key_relationships.yssa: She's tried talking to him. He answered in single words. She found it funny. He didn't.
key_relationships.cullum: Two people who exist at the edges of the Camp. They don't interact. They notice each other.

flags.secret_hint: What he's watching for at the gate. What the three of them left behind. It may still be coming.
